name: 跑起来吧,小伙小姑娘们.'s Regex

entries.replaceString:
<style>
.rm-scene{
position:relative;
background:var(--panel-bg);
border:2px solid var(--panel-border);
border-radius:var(--rm-radius);
padding:16px 20px;
margin-bottom:var(--rm-gap);
overflow:hidden;
box-shadow:var(--rm-shadow);
}

.rm-scene::before{
content:'';
position:absolute;
top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;
background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--rm-red),var(--rm-gold),var(--rm-red),transparent);
animation:rm-flow 4s linear infinite;
background-size:200% 100%;
}

.rm-scene::after{
content:'';
position:absolute;
top:0;left:0;width:2px;height:100%;
background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,var(--rm-cyan),transparent);
animation:rm-scan 3s linear infinite;
opacity:.5;
}

.rm-scene-corner{position:absolute;width:14px;height:14px;border:2px solid var(--rm-red)}
.rm-scene-corner-tl{top:6px;left:6px;border-right:none;border-bottom:none;border-radius:2px 0 0 0}
.rm-scene-corner-tr{top:6px;right:6px;border-left:none;border-bottom:none;border-radius:0 2px 0 0}
.rm-scene-corner-bl{bottom:6px;left:6px;border-right:none;border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 0 2px}
.rm-scene-corner-br{bottom:6px;right:6px;border-left:none;border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 2px 0}

.rm-scene-rec{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px}
.rm-scene-rec-dot{width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--rm-red);border-radius:50%;animation:rm-pulse 1s ease-in-out infinite;box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--rm-red)}
.rm-scene-rec-text{font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:var(--rm-red);font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(227,24,55,.5)}

.rm-scene-time{position:absolute;top:16px;right:20px;font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--rm-gold);text-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,215,0,.5);animation:rm-float 4s ease-in-out infinite}

.rm-scene-location{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--rm-white);padding-left:14px;border-left:4px solid var(--rm-red);margin:14px 0;text-shadow:1px 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.5);position:relative}
.rm-scene-location::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:0;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.2),transparent);animation:rm-shine 3s ease-in-out infinite}

.rm-scene-state{display:inline-block;background:var(--rm-red);color:var(--rm-white);font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(227,24,55,.4);text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}

.rm-scene-divider{height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--rm-red),var(--rm-gold),var(--rm-red),transparent);margin-top:14px;animation:rm-flow 4s linear infinite;background-size:200% 100%}
.rm-rec{
position:relative;
background:var(--panel-bg);
border:2px solid var(--panel-border);
border-radius:var(--rm-radius);
padding:16px;
margin-bottom:var(--rm-gap);
box-shadow:var(--rm-shadow);
}

.rm-rec-header{
margin-bottom:16px;
padding-bottom:14px;
border-bottom:2px solid transparent;
background:linear-gradient(var(--rm-dark),var(--rm-dark)) padding-box,linear-gradient(90deg,var(--rm-red),var(--rm-gold),var(--rm-red)) border-box;
background-size:100% 100%,200% 100%;
animation:rm-flow 4s linear infinite;
border-radius:6px;
padding:12px;
}

.rm-rec-plan{
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:22px;
font-weight:bold;
color:var(--rm-gold);
text-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,215,0,.4);
margin-bottom:10px;
}

.rm-rec-meta{
display:flex;
flex-wrap:wrap;
gap:10px 18px;
font-size:13px;
font-weight:500;
color:var(--rm-gray);
}

.rm-rec-meta-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.rm-rec-meta-label{color:var(--rm-gray)}
.rm-rec-meta-value{color:var(--rm-white);font-weight:600}
.rm-rec-meta-value.alive{color:var(--rm-green);text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(50,205,50,.4)}
.rm-rec-meta-value.out{color:var(--rm-red);text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(227,24,55,.4)}

.rm-rec-members{
display:grid;
grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);
gap:10px;
margin-top:14px;
}
.rm-member{
position:relative;
background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e1e2e,#252535);
border-radius:var(--rm-radius);
padding:14px;
border-left:4px solid var(--c0);
cursor:pointer;
transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;
box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
overflow:hidden;
}

.rm-member:active{transform:scale(.98);box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}

.rm-member::before{
content:'';
position:absolute;
top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;
background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(227,24,55,.03),transparent);
pointer-events:none;
}

.rm-member[data-color="0"]{border-left-color:var(--c0)}
.rm-member[data-color="1"]{border-left-color:var(--c1)}
.rm-member[data-color="2"]{border-left-color:var(--c2)}
.rm-member[data-color="3"]{border-left-color:var(--c3)}
.rm-member[data-color="4"]{border-left-color:var(--c4)}
.rm-member[data-color="5"]{border-left-color:var(--c5)}
.rm-member[data-color="6"]{border-left-color:var(--c6)}
.rm-member[data-color="7"]{border-left-color:var(--c7)}
.rm-member[data-color="8"]{border-left-color:var(--c8)}
.rm-member[data-color="9"]{border-left-color:var(--c9)}
.rm-member[data-color="10"]{border-left-color:var(--c10)}
.rm-member[data-color="11"]{border-left-color:var(--c11)}

.rm-member.is-out{filter:grayscale(.8);opacity:.7;animation:rm-tear .5s ease forwards}
.rm-member.is-out::after{
content:'OUT';
position:absolute;
top:10px;right:10px;
background:var(--rm-red);
color:var(--rm-white);
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:11px;
font-weight:bold;
padding:3px 8px;
border-radius:4px;
transform:rotate(12deg);
box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(227,24,55,.5);
}

.rm-member-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;overflow:hidden}

.rm-nametag{
display:inline-flex;
align-items:center;
justify-content:center;
background:var(--rm-red);
color:var(--rm-white);
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:14px;
font-weight:bold;
padding:6px 10px;
border-radius:6px;
box-shadow:3px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.3);
position:relative;
overflow:hidden;
white-space:nowrap;
}

.rm-nametag::before{
content:'';
position:absolute;
top:0;left:-100%;
width:100%;height:100%;
background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.3),transparent);
animation:rm-shine 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.rm-nametag.alive{animation:rm-glow 2s ease-in-out infinite}

.rm-member-identity{font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--rm-gray);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;flex:1;min-width:0}

.rm-member-attitude{
position:absolute;
top:12px;right:12px;
font-size:12px;
font-weight:600;
padding:4px 10px;
border-radius:12px;
background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);
color:var(--rm-white);
}
.rm-member-hp{margin:10px 0}
.rm-member-hp-bar{height:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.rm-member-hp-fill{height:100%;border-radius:4px;transition:width .3s}
.rm-member-hp-fill.high{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--rm-green),#5fd35f);box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(50,205,50,.4)}
.rm-member-hp-fill.mid{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--rm-orange),#ff9040);box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(255,107,53,.4);animation:rm-breathe 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.rm-member-hp-fill.low{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--rm-red),#ff4040);box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(227,24,55,.5);animation:rm-pulse 1s ease-in-out infinite}
.rm-member-hp-text{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--rm-gray);text-align:right;margin-top:4px}

.rm-member-loc{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--rm-gray);margin-top:8px}
.rm-member-loc-pos{color:var(--rm-white);font-weight:600}
.rm-member-loc-act{color:var(--rm-cyan);font-weight:600}

.rm-member-sweat{
position:absolute;
top:0;left:25%;
width:4px;height:8px;
background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,rgba(135,206,235,.8));
border-radius:50%;
opacity:0;
pointer-events:none;
}
.rm-member.hp-low .rm-member-sweat{opacity:1;animation:rm-sweat 1.5s ease-in infinite}
.rm-member.hp-critical .rm-member-sweat{opacity:1;animation:rm-sweat 1s ease-in infinite}
.rm-member.hp-critical::after{
content:'';
position:absolute;
top:0;left:45%;
width:3px;height:6px;
background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,rgba(135,206,235,.6));
border-radius:50%;
animation:rm-sweat 1.2s ease-in infinite .3s;
}

.rm-member-details{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .3s ease-out}
.rm-member-details.expanded{max-height:500px}
.rm-member-details-inner{padding-top:12px;margin-top:12px;border-top:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,.15)}
.rm-member-detail-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;padding:5px 0}
.rm-member-detail-label{color:var(--rm-gray)}
.rm-member-detail-value{color:var(--rm-white);font-weight:600}

.rm-member-toggle{
display:flex;
align-items:center;
justify-content:center;
gap:6px;
font-size:12px;
font-weight:600;
color:var(--rm-gray);
margin-top:10px;
padding-top:10px;
border-top:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,.1);
transition:color .2s;
}
.rm-member-toggle:active{color:var(--rm-white)}
.rm-member-toggle-arrow{display:inline-block;transition:transform .3s}
.rm-member.expanded .rm-member-toggle-arrow{transform:rotate(180deg)}
.rm-story{
position:relative;
background:var(--rm-story-bg);
color:var(--rm-story-text);
font-size:15px;
line-height:1.9;
padding:24px 20px;
margin-bottom:var(--rm-gap);
border:4px solid #1a1a1a;
border-radius:4px;
box-shadow:6px 6px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.2);
}

.rm-story::before,.rm-story::after{
content:'';
position:absolute;
width:0;height:0;
border:14px solid transparent;
}
.rm-story::before{top:-4px;left:-4px;border-top-color:#1a1a1a;border-left-color:#1a1a1a}
.rm-story::after{bottom:-4px;right:-4px;border-bottom-color:#1a1a1a;border-right-color:#1a1a1a}

.rm-story-corner-tr,.rm-story-corner-bl{position:absolute;width:0;height:0;border:14px solid transparent}
.rm-story-corner-tr{top:-4px;right:-4px;border-top-color:#1a1a1a;border-right-color:#1a1a1a}
.rm-story-corner-bl{bottom:-4px;left:-4px;border-bottom-color:#1a1a1a;border-left-color:#1a1a1a}

.rm-story{white-space:pre-line}

.rm-story-dialogue{
position:relative;
background:#fff;
border:2px solid #333;
border-radius:10px;
padding:12px 18px;
margin:14px 0;
text-indent:0;
box-shadow:3px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.1);
font-weight:500;
}
.rm-story-dialogue::after{
content:'';
position:absolute;
left:20px;bottom:-10px;
width:0;height:0;
border:10px solid transparent;
border-top-color:#333;
border-bottom:none;
}

.rm-story-name{
font-weight:bold;
color:var(--rm-red);
border-bottom:2px solid var(--rm-red);
padding-bottom:1px;
}

.rm-story-action{
font-weight:bold;
color:#333;
background:linear-gradient(transparent 60%,rgba(255,215,0,.35) 60%);
padding:0 2px;
}
.rm-chars{
position:relative;
background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1f1018,#2a1525);
border:2px solid rgba(255,107,157,.3);
border-radius:var(--rm-radius);
padding:16px;
margin-bottom:var(--rm-gap);
box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(255,107,157,.1);
overflow:hidden;
}

.rm-chars::before{
content:'';
position:absolute;
top:0;left:0;bottom:0;
width:4px;
background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--rm-pink),var(--rm-purple),var(--rm-hotpink));
animation:rm-breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.rm-chars-title{
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:14px;
color:var(--rm-pink);
margin-bottom:14px;
padding-left:12px;
text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,107,157,.3);
}

.rm-chars-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}

.rm-char{
position:relative;
background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2a1a25,#1f1520);
border:1px solid rgba(255,107,157,.3);
border-radius:var(--rm-radius);
padding:16px;
transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s;
}

.rm-char:active{border-color:var(--rm-pink);box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,107,157,.25)}

.rm-char::before{
content:'';
position:absolute;
top:0;left:0;bottom:0;
width:3px;
background:var(--rm-pink);
border-radius:3px 0 0 3px;
}

.rm-char-header{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px}

.rm-char-name{
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:20px;
font-weight:bold;
color:var(--rm-pink);
text-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,107,157,.4);
}

.rm-char-sex{font-size:13px;color:var(--rm-gray)}

.rm-char-divider{
height:1px;
background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,107,157,.4),transparent);
margin:12px 0;
}

.rm-char-meters{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px}

.rm-char-meter{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}

.rm-char-meter-label{
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:12px;
font-weight:600;
color:var(--rm-gray);
width:42px;
}

.rm-char-meter-bar{
flex:1;
height:10px;
background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);
border-radius:5px;
overflow:hidden;
box-shadow:inset 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
}

.rm-char-meter-fill{height:100%;border-radius:5px;transition:width .3s}

.rm-char-meter-value{
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:12px;
font-weight:bold;
color:var(--rm-white);
width:22px;
text-align:center;
}
.rm-char-meter-fill.emo-A,.rm-char-meter-fill.desire-A{width:20%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#FFB6C1,#FFC0CB)}
.rm-char-meter-fill.emo-B,.rm-char-meter-fill.desire-B{width:40%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#FF69B4,#FF85C1)}
.rm-char-meter-fill.emo-C,.rm-char-meter-fill.desire-C{width:60%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#FF1493,#FF45A3);box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(255,20,147,.4)}
.rm-char-meter-fill.emo-D,.rm-char-meter-fill.desire-D{width:80%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#DC143C,#FF2050);box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(220,20,60,.5);animation:rm-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.rm-char-meter-fill.emo-E,.rm-char-meter-fill.desire-E{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8B0000,#B01030);box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(139,0,0,.6),0 0 30px rgba(139,0,0,.3);animation:rm-throb .8s ease-in-out infinite}

.rm-char-stage{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px}
.rm-char-stage-label{font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--rm-gray);width:42px}
.rm-char-stage-dots{display:flex;gap:6px}
.rm-char-stage-dot{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);transition:all .3s}
.rm-char-stage-dot.active{border-color:currentColor;box-shadow:0 0 8px currentColor}
.rm-char-stage-dot.s1.active,.rm-char-stage-dot.s2.active{background:#6B8E9F;color:#6B8E9F}
.rm-char-stage-dot.s3.active{background:var(--rm-green);color:var(--rm-green);box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(50,205,50,.5)}
.rm-char-stage-dot.s4.active{background:var(--rm-gold);color:var(--rm-gold);box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,215,0,.5)}
.rm-char-stage-dot.s5.active{background:var(--rm-orange);color:var(--rm-orange);box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(255,107,53,.5)}
.rm-char-stage-dot.s6.active{background:var(--rm-pink);color:var(--rm-pink);box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(255,105,180,.5);animation:rm-pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite}
.rm-char-stage-dot.s7.active{background:var(--rm-hotpink);color:var(--rm-hotpink);box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,20,147,.6),0 0 30px rgba(255,20,147,.3);animation:rm-heartbeat .8s ease-in-out infinite}
.rm-char-stage-value{font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--rm-white);margin-left:6px}
.rm-char-content{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}

.rm-char-thought{
font-style:italic;
color:var(--rm-pink);
font-size:14px;
font-weight:500;
padding:10px 14px;
background:rgba(255,107,157,.08);
border-radius:8px;
border-left:3px solid var(--rm-pink);
}
.rm-char-thought::before{content:'『'}
.rm-char-thought::after{content:'』'}

.rm-char-sense{
font-size:13px;
font-weight:500;
color:var(--rm-gray);
padding:8px 12px;
background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);
border-radius:6px;
}

.rm-char-row{
display:flex;
flex-wrap:wrap;
gap:8px;
font-size:13px;
padding:6px 0;
}

.rm-char-label{
color:var(--rm-gray);
padding:4px 10px;
background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
border-radius:6px;
font-size:12px;
font-weight:600;
}

.rm-char-value{
color:var(--rm-white);
font-size:13px;
font-weight:500;
flex:1;
}

.rm-char-sensitive{
margin-top:14px;
padding:14px;
background:rgba(139,0,0,.12);
border-radius:8px;
border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,.25);
}

.rm-char-sensitive-title{
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:12px;
font-weight:600;
color:var(--rm-hotpink);
margin-bottom:10px;
text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(255,20,147,.3);
}

.rm-char-sensitive-row{
display:flex;
flex-wrap:wrap;
gap:14px;
font-size:13px;
}

.rm-char-sensitive-item{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center}

.rm-char-sensitive-label{
color:var(--rm-pink);
font-weight:600;
padding:3px 8px;
background:rgba(255,107,157,.1);
border-radius:4px;
}

.rm-char-sensitive-value{color:var(--rm-white);font-weight:500}

.rm-char-sensitive-value.wet{
color:var(--rm-hotpink);
text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,20,147,.5);
animation:rm-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.rm-note{
position:relative;
background:linear-gradient(135deg,#141418,#1a1a22);
border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
border-radius:var(--rm-radius);
padding:16px;
margin-bottom:var(--rm-gap);
display:flex;
flex-direction:column;
gap:14px;
}

.rm-note-item{
position:relative;
padding:14px 16px;
padding-left:22px;
border-radius:8px;
}

.rm-note-item::before{
content:'';
position:absolute;
left:0;top:0;bottom:0;
width:4px;
border-radius:4px 0 0 4px;
}

.rm-note-label{
position:absolute;
top:-10px;left:14px;
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:11px;
font-weight:bold;
padding:3px 10px;
border-radius:4px;
}

.rm-note-text{
font-size:14px;
font-weight:500;
line-height:1.8;
margin-top:8px;
}

.rm-note-undercurrent{
background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0808,#2a1212);
border:1px solid rgba(227,24,55,.25);
}
.rm-note-undercurrent::before{background:var(--rm-red)}
.rm-note-undercurrent .rm-note-label{
background:var(--rm-red);
color:var(--rm-white);
animation:rm-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(227,24,55,.4);
}
.rm-note-undercurrent .rm-note-text{color:var(--rm-white)}

.rm-note-world{
background:linear-gradient(135deg,#081018,#101828);
border:1px solid rgba(30,144,255,.25);
}
.rm-note-world::before{background:var(--rm-blue)}
.rm-note-world .rm-note-label{
background:var(--rm-blue);
color:var(--rm-white);
box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(30,144,255,.3);
}
.rm-note-world .rm-note-text{color:#87CEEB}

.rm-note-comment{
background:transparent;
border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,.25);
}
.rm-note-comment::before{background:var(--rm-gold)}
.rm-note-comment .rm-note-label{
background:var(--rm-gold);
color:#1a1a1a;
box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,215,0,.3);
}
.rm-note-comment .rm-note-text{
color:var(--rm-gold);
font-style:italic;
}
.rm-options{
position:relative;
background:linear-gradient(135deg,#141418,#1a1a22);
border:2px solid var(--panel-border);
border-radius:var(--rm-radius);
padding:16px;
margin-bottom:var(--rm-gap);
box-shadow:var(--rm-shadow);
}

.rm-options-title{
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:14px;
color:var(--rm-gray);
margin-bottom:14px;
text-align:center;
letter-spacing:2px;
}

.rm-options-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}

.rm-opt{
position:relative;
display:flex;
align-items:center;
gap:14px;
background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e1e2e,#252535);
border:2px solid transparent;
border-radius:var(--rm-radius);
padding:14px 16px;
cursor:pointer;
transition:all .2s;
overflow:hidden;
}

.rm-opt::before{
content:'';
position:absolute;
inset:0;
border-radius:var(--rm-radius);
padding:2px;
background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--rm-red),var(--rm-gold),var(--rm-pink));
-webkit-mask:linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box,linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
-webkit-mask-composite:xor;
mask-composite:exclude;
pointer-events:none;
opacity:.6;
transition:opacity .2s;
}

.rm-opt:active{transform:scale(.98)}
.rm-opt:active::before{opacity:1}

.rm-opt-num{
width:28px;
height:28px;
background:var(--rm-red);
color:var(--rm-white);
border-radius:50%;
display:flex;
align-items:center;
justify-content:center;
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:14px;
font-weight:bold;
flex-shrink:0;
box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(227,24,55,.4);
}

.rm-opt-text{
flex:1;
color:var(--rm-white);
font-size:15px;
font-weight:600;
line-height:1.5;
}

.rm-opt-arrow{
width:0;height:0;
border:6px solid transparent;
border-left-color:var(--rm-gold);
flex-shrink:0;
transition:border-left-color .2s,transform .2s;
}

.rm-opt:active .rm-opt-arrow{
border-left-color:var(--rm-white);
transform:translateX(4px);
}

.rm-opt-ripple{
position:absolute;
border-radius:50%;
background:rgba(255,255,255,.25);
transform:scale(0);
pointer-events:none;
}

.rm-opt-copied{
position:absolute;
right:16px;
top:50%;
transform:translateY(-50%);
font-family:'ZCOOL KuaiLe',sans-serif;
font-size:12px;
color:var(--rm-green);
opacity:0;
transition:opacity .3s;
text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(50,205,50,.5);
}

.rm-opt.copied{box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(50,205,50,.3)}
.rm-opt.copied::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--rm-green),var(--rm-green));opacity:1}
.rm-opt.copied .rm-opt-copied{opacity:1}
@media(max-width:480px){
.rm-scene{padding:14px 16px}
.rm-scene-time{font-size:16px;top:14px;right:16px}
.rm-scene-location{font-size:16px}
.rm-rec-plan{font-size:18px}
.rm-member{padding:12px}
.rm-nametag{font-size:13px;padding:5px 8px}
.rm-story{padding:18px 16px;font-size:14px}
.rm-char{padding:14px}
.rm-char-name{font-size:18px}
.rm-opt{padding:12px 14px}
.rm-opt-num{width:24px;height:24px;font-size:12px}
.rm-opt-text{font-size:14px}
}

@media(max-width:360px){
.rm-scene-corner{display:none}
.rm-scene-time{position:static;margin-top:10px}
.rm-rec-meta{font-size:11px}
.rm-member-hp-text{font-size:11px}
.rm-rec-members{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}

@media(min-width:768px){
.rm-rec-members{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
.rm-story{padding:28px 32px;font-size:16px}
}

@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
*{animation-duration:.01ms!important;animation-iteration-count:1!important;transition-duration:.01ms!important}
}

@media(prefers-color-scheme:light){
.rm-bg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f8f0f2 0%,#fff5f7 50%,#f8f0f2 100%);border-image:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--rm-red),var(--rm-gold),var(--rm-red),var(--rm-gold)) 1}
.rm-bg::before{background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 0% 0%,rgba(227,24,55,.08) 0%,transparent 40%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 100% 0%,rgba(255,215,0,.06) 0%,transparent 40%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 100% 100%,rgba(227,24,55,.08) 0%,transparent 40%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 0% 100%,rgba(255,215,0,.06) 0%,transparent 40%)}
.rm-bg::after{color:rgba(227,24,55,.05)}
.rm-scene{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#faf8f9);border-color:#ddd}
.rm-scene-location{color:#333;text-shadow:none}
.rm-scene-rec-text{color:#cc1a30}
.rm-rec{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#faf8f9);border-color:#ddd}
.rm-rec-header{background:linear-gradient(#fff,#fff) padding-box,linear-gradient(90deg,var(--rm-red),var(--rm-gold),var(--rm-red)) border-box}
.rm-rec-plan{color:#B8860B;text-shadow:none}
.rm-rec-meta-value{color:#333}
.rm-member{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#faf8f9)}
.rm-member-detail-value{color:#333}
.rm-member-identity{color:#666}
.rm-member-loc{color:#666}
.rm-member-loc-pos{color:#333}
.rm-member-hp-text{color:#666}
.rm-member-detail-label{color:#666}
.rm-member-toggle{color:#666}
.rm-chars{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff0f5,#ffe4ec);border-color:#ffb6c1}
.rm-chars-title{color:#cc5080}
.rm-char{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff5f8,#ffecf0);border-color:rgba(255,105,180,.3)}
.rm-char-sex{color:#666}
.rm-char-meter-label{color:#666}
.rm-char-meter-bar{background:#f0d0d8}
.rm-char-stage-label{color:#666}
.rm-char-sense{color:#666}
.rm-char-label{color:#666;background:rgba(0,0,0,.05)}
.rm-char-value{color:#333}
.rm-char-sensitive{background:rgba(255,180,200,.15);border-color:rgba(255,105,180,.25)}
.rm-char-sensitive-value{color:#333}
.rm-note{background:#f8f8f8;border-color:#ddd}
.rm-note-undercurrent{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff5f5,#ffe8e8)}
.rm-note-undercurrent .rm-note-text{color:#333}
.rm-note-world{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0f8ff,#e6f3ff)}
.rm-note-world .rm-note-text{color:#1a5a8a}
.rm-note-comment .rm-note-text{color:#996600}
.rm-options{background:#f8f8f8;border-color:#ddd}
.rm-opt{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff,#faf8f9)}
.rm-opt-text{color:#333}
}

@media(prefers-contrast:high){
.rm-scene{border-width:3px}
.rm-nametag{border:2px solid #fff}
.rm-story{border-width:5px}
.rm-char{border-width:2px}
.rm-opt::before{padding:3px}
.rm-note-item{border-width:2px}
}
.rm-story q{display:block;position:relative;background:#fff;border:2px solid #333;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 18px;margin:14px 0;box-shadow:3px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.1);font-style:normal;quotes:none}
.rm-story q::before{content:none}
.rm-story q::after{content:'';position:absolute;left:20px;bottom:-10px;width:0;height:0;border:10px solid transparent;border-top-color:#333;border-bottom:none}
</style>
